content.en:
"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, you are a creature of the realm, too far away from the Dark Sacred Domain, without the strength of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, you can't easily cross the Dark Forbidden Domain, otherwise you will fall if you are not careful. Therefore, before you become the ancestor of the Supreme Domain, we will not ask you to come to the Dark Sacred Domain! Your future resources and treatment benefits, we will directly hand them over to you through the Battle Realm Tower! But correspondingly, you will not be able to obtain some cultivation treasure land treatment from the Battle Gate, after all, you will not be able to come to the Dark Sacred Domain!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor took Ye Tian to an independent space in the Battle Realm Tower and explained to Ye Tian.

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"This is the Holy Son Token of the Battle Gate, after you refine it, you will be the Holy Son of the Battle Gate, and there is also an independent space in the Battle Realm Tower that only allows the half-step domain ancestor of the Battle Gate to enter. Although there were not many people there, there were occasionally some sons of the Battle Gate who entered. If you communicate with them, you can communicate more. In addition, the Black Yuan Holy Body Inheritance and the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body Inheritance will take a few days to be delivered to you. As for resources, you can go directly to the independent space of the Battle Gate to get them!"

Blood Gang Domain Ancestral Dao.

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded.

When the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor left, Ye Tian refined the Holy Son Token.

Through the Holy Son Token, Ye Tian came to the independent space of the Battle Gate-the Battle Domain Realm!

The War Realm is huge, comparable to a small universe.

Perhaps in the eyes of the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, there are not many people here, but in Ye Tian's eyes, there are too many people here.

The dense half-step domain ancestors, located here, are about a million.

In fact, so many half-step domain ancestors were not really members of the Battle Gate, and they were basically vassals of the strong men of the Battle Gate.

For example, a Zhanmen powerhouse has many subordinates, and these subordinates are considered half of the Zhanmen people, but they can't enjoy the treatment of the Zhanmen, they are also qualified to enter here, but their status is far from comparable to that of a holy son like Ye Tian.

Ye Tian came here without attracting anyone's attention at all.

After all, there are so many half-step domain ancestors here, who cares about Ye Tian!

There are many cities and private territories in the war domain, and the private territories basically belong to the territories of the real members of the war gate, and the general subordinate members are not eligible to have private territories.

Of course, if the affiliated members are good enough, they can also become real members of the Battle Gate.

However, the Zhanmen is one of the ten holy gates, and the requirements for disciples are too high, and ordinary geniuses don't pay attention to it, so how difficult it is to become a disciple of the Zhanmen.

Ye Tian came to the core area of the War Domain Realm, War Domain City.

There is a large hall in the Battle Domain City, which is an institution of the Battle Gate-the War Palace!

The Battle Hall is responsible for many affairs of the Battle Realm Tower, and the Half-Step Domain Ancestors can also exchange resources here, and even buy some inheritance of the Battle Gate, etc.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Battle Palace, ready to receive a piece of his own private territory and the resources of the Holy Son.

When Ye Tian revealed his identity, he immediately attracted the attention of many half-step domain ancestors in the Battle Hall.

After investigation, they confirmed Ye Tian's identity, he was indeed the Holy Son, and he was the Holy Son who had just been promoted!

"I've seen the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws!"

The person in charge of the Battle Palace, Chen Huang, who had cultivated to the level of the One Realm, immediately said respectfully.

"I want to claim a piece of private land and resources that belong to me, no problem, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"No problem, Holy Son, please wait!"

Tatsuhara quickly went to prepare.

After a while, a void ring containing a large amount of resources was brought by Chen Huang and handed to Ye Tian.

"So many resources !!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised in his heart.

The resources here are all very precious, and any kind of resources are comparable to the Forbidden Supreme Treasure level, so many resources are probably more than the treasure house of the Black Wind Mountain, and this is only the share of resources of a Holy Son of the Battle Gate.

Although the Holy Son only receives his share once in 100 million years, it is still shocking that there are so many resources.

Subsequently, Ye Tian also received a piece of private land belonging to him.

Originally, as a holy son, he should have many vassals, and Chen Huang was also ready to recruit a group of vassals for Ye Tian, but he refused.

If he really wanted to choose a vassal, he would also look for those half-step domain ancestors from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm!

-----------------

Ye Tian's private territory was a sacred mountain, standing in the void, surrounded by powerful prohibitions, and no one could enter except Ye Tian.

If you cultivate here, you won't be disturbed in any way.

Moreover, in the Divine Mountain Territory, there is also a Tower of Time, which can speed up time by 1 million times, and if you want to cultivate in the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, it will be too difficult to cultivate in 1 million times.

But here, it seems like the usual acceleration time.

When Ye Tian entered the Divine Mountain, he began to fuse the countless forbidden talents he had copied before.

However, just by fusing not many forbidden talents, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor sent the inheritance of the Black Yuan Holy Body and the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body.

Ye Tian did not immediately cultivate the Black Yuan Holy Body and the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body, but continued to fuse those countless forbidden talents.

This time, he copied too many forbidden talents.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai fused so many forbidden talents.

Then, he began to fuse a forbidden talent, which was basically fused according to attributes.

Under such a fusion, Ye Tian's forbidden talent became stronger and stronger, far surpassing the ordinary forbidden talent.

And among these forbidden talents, the speed class has the most forbidden talents, and after fusing a large number of speed class forbidden talents, his forbidden talents have finally changed and produced a qualitative change.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's forbidden talent has transformed.

In the Tower of Time, I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian was born with a new talent.

【Holy Endowment: Streamer】

"Shengfu, what kind of talent is this?"

Ye Tian wondered.

He had never heard of any Holy Gifts, and even after being in the War Boundary Tower for so long, he had not found any Holy Gifts.

But one thing is for sure, the level of the Holy Endowment is afraid to surpass the forbidden talent, because it is the fusion and transformation of countless forbidden talents.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian came to the War Hall and applied to enter the War Palace's Library to check the information, he wanted to find the record of the Holy Gift.

He didn't ask anyone, otherwise he was worried that his holy endowment would be exposed, and it would be bad if it caused something bad!
